description: Just a basic punch, nothing to see here.
name: Attack
note:
<setup action>

display action

if user.attackMotion() !== 'missile'

camera focus: target
zoom: 150%, 20

 camera offset: right, 50


else

camera focus: user
zoom: 250%, 20
wait: 20
camera focus: target
zoom: 150%, 20
 camera offset: right, 50

end

immortal: targets, true
</setup action>

<target action>

if user.attackMotion() !== 'missile'
  move user: targets, front, 20
else
  perform start
end


wait for movement
MOVE user: FORWARD, (3), (2)
motion attack: user
wait: 10
attack animation: target
wait for animation

action effect
wait for animation
wait for movement
wait: 5

</target action>

description:
Protects you slightly from enemies and increases your
TP over time.
name: Guard
note:
Skill #2 will be used when you select
the Guard command.

description:
A powerful punch for the opponent's face. Even with a
weapon in one hand, you can still use this skill.
name: Strong punch
note:
<target action>

opacity not focus: 0, 20

wait for opacity

opacity user: 0%, 5

move user: target, front, 5

wait for opacity

opacity user: 100%, 5

wait for opacity

motion attack: user

action animation

ani wait: 5

action effect

immortal: target, false

Wait 30

move user: home, 5

face user: forward

wait for animation

wait for movement

</target action>

<follow action>

opacity not focus: 100%, 60

wait for opacity

</follow action>

name: Umbrakinesis

location to fight by you in battle

BATTLE START
note:
<setup action>
camera focus: all allies
zoom: 150%, 49
MOTION STANDBY: character 1
MOTION STANDBY: character 2
MOTION GUARD: character 3
MOTION SWING: character 4
MOTION ITEM: character 5
motion wait: all allies
wait: 25
</setup action>


<target action>
camera focus: all enemies
zoom: 150%,20
wait: 35
zoom: 110%, 10
wait: 10


jump all allies: 10,20
</target action>

description: Puts the opponent to sleep.
name: Soothing song

description:
The power of firing light magic at the opponent.
Costs a lot of MP.
name: Magic Firer
note:
<custom show eval>
//set this to the weapon ID
var wepId = 13;
var equipList = user._equips[0];
var currentEquip = equipList._itemId;
//dualwield support start, optional.
var equipOffhand = user._equips[1];
var offhandId = equipOffhand._itemId;
var offIsWep = equipOffhand._dataClass;
//dualwield support end, if undesired remove the above code till the start point, as well as "|| offIsWep == "weapon" && offhandId == wepId" from next line
if (currentEquip == wepId || offIsWep == "weapon" && offhandId == wepId){
visible = true;
} else {
visible = false;
}


</custom show eval>

An extremely powerful attack given to you after helping
Amare out. Beware of the power of the moon.
name: Moonshine

name: Confuzzle

description: Like a regular strike but the strike is pink!
name: Pink strike

description:
Pretty darn powerful, if you ask me! It's not REALLY 
evil but, who cares, right?
name: Ultimate evil
note:
<Target Action>

SHAKE SCREEN: 5, 5, 300

move user: target, front base, 30

jump user: 100, 120

motion SPELL: user

animation 6: target

TINT SCREEN: SEPIA, 20

perform action

SE: PLAY USE SKILL

MOTION ABNORMAL: target

action animation: target

wait for animation

action effect: target

death break

TINT SCREEN: NORMAL, 20

perform finish

</Target Action>

description: Silences magic ability, causes magic repression.
name: Magic-be-gone

description: Buffs HP for 5 turns.
name: HP booster

description: Buffs MP for 5 turns. To use more magic, I guess.
name: MP booster

description: Buffs attack for 5 turns. Time to punch stuff!
name: Attack booster

description: Buffs defence for 5 turns.
name: Defence booster

description: Buffs M.attack for 5 turns.
name: Magic booster

description: Buffs M.defence for 5 turns.
name: M.defence booster

description: Buffs agility for 5 turns. Yay! Speed!
name: Speed booster

description: Buffs luck for 5 turns.
name: Luck booster

description:
Increases an ally's TP by 10. 
Mostly for melee fighters.
name: TP booster

description: Grrrrrrrr! Angry!
name: Angry rage
note:
<target action>

hide battle hud

opacity not focus: 0, 20

move user: target, front, 5

wait for opacity

opacity user: 100%, 5

wait for opacity

move user: target, front base, 20, auto offset x -100

motion attack: user

action animation

float target: 500%, 30

wait for float

float target: 0%, 10

wait for float

shake screen: 3, 9, 10

ani wait: 5

action effect

immortal: target, false

Wait 30

move user: home, 5

face user: forward

wait for animation

wait for movement

</target action>

<follow action>

opacity not focus: 100%, 60

wait for opacity

show battle hud

</follow action>

description: Um...yeah...it's something.
name: Eye attack

description: Eye attack but more awesome!
name: Mega eye attack

description:
Beat your opponent with a super special slash!
Harms the opponent even from a distance
name: Special slash

description: Heals all allies.
name: Healing power

description:
Summons a magical unicorn to heal an ally.
More powerful than summon dolphins.
name: Summon unicorn

description: Summons a duplicate of yourself.
name: Summon duplicate

description: Summons a fiercesome dragon!!!
name: Summon Dragon
note:
<setup action>
hide battle hud
display action

immortal: targets, true

</setup action>

<target action>

cast animation

camera focus: user

zoom: 120%, 30

if user.attackMotion() !== ‘missile’

move user: targets, front, 30

else

perform start

end

motion standby: user

wait for movement

face user: target

motion attack: user

wait: 10

action animation

wait for animation

action effect
show battle hud

</target action>
show battle hud
